findings.description: RISK-002 (high) has no covering test case at all; the spec cannot exercise it. A high-severity risk with zero coverage blocks auto-approval and should be sent back to Gate 2 to add a case.
TC-001 covers the happy path for RISK-001 but the spec has no negative scenario, though the risk implies one.
TC-003 is a styling-only check; consider marking it manual rather than automating it as E2E.

recommendations: Re-open Gate 2 to add a test case covering RISK-002 (or record an explicit accept-without-test decision).
Add a negative scenario for TC-001.
